artifacts.name: summaries table
artifacts.body:
CREATE TABLE summaries (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
    push_id UUID NOT NULL,
    layer TEXT NOT NULL,
    content_json JSONB NOT NULL,
    content_markdown TEXT NOT NULL
);

artifacts.name: render helper
push pipeline milestones

- Module 2: schema + migrations
- Module 3: auth
